notes: The ping adaptor exposes no documented public operations (ast operations[] is empty); it is a thin HTTP client with generic get/post/request helpers plus Azure AD B2C OAuth. The dist source references an Azure B2C token host (primespingb2cuat.b2clogin.com) and an APIM scope (primespingb2cuat.onmicrosoft.com/apimurls/API.Read), i.e. a private 'SPING' API with no public vendor spec. Synthesized a minimal OpenAPI 3.0 from the adaptor surface: OAuth token endpoint, a connectivity probe, and generic record read/write paths mirroring the get/post/request helpers. Server URL is a placeholder; real host is instance-specific.
